title: Member for nonaqueous electrolyte batteries
abstract: A member for a non-aqueous electrolyte battery containing a copolymer containing a tetrafluoroethylene unit and a fluoroalkyl vinyl ether unit, in which the number of functional groups per 106carbon atoms of a main chain of the copolymer is 100 or less, and a melt flow rate of the copolymer is less than 20 g/10 minutes.
claims: 1. A non-aqueous electrolyte battery comprising a member for the non-battery, wherein the member comprises a copolymer containing a tetrafluoroethylene unit and a fluoroalkyl vinyl ether unit, a content of the fluoroalkyl vinyl ether unit in the copolymer is 1.0 to 10.0 mass % based on all monomer units, and a number of functional groups per 106 carbon atoms of a main chain of the copolymer is 100 or less, and a melt flow rate of the copolymer is less than 20 g/10 minutes.
